title: Programmer Nether
description: A texture pack that reimagines how the Nether Update would be without the JAPPA textures.
body:
## Programmer Nether > **IMPORTANT:** This pack is designed to be used with the built-in **Programmer Art** resource pack in vanilla Minecraft for the best experience. > You may also use other Programmer Art continuity projects, but they should always be loaded below this pack in the resource pack list. > If you intend to use this pack for your own project, please refer to the **For Modpacks and similar use** section below. ### About This texture pack remakes all block textures introduced in the Nether Update to match the style of Minecraft's Golden Age, prior to JAPPA's Texture Update. It aims to make them feel like they belong naturally within the Programmer Art aesthetic. ### Features - Enhanced Netherrack texture - Redesigned both Nether Quartz and Gold Ore - Reworked Crimson and Warped Nylium - Made Warped Wart Block resemble classic Nether Wart Block - New textures for all blocks in the Crimson and Warped Wood sets - Soul Soil redesigned to resemble classic Sand - New textures for all Basalt types - New textures for all Blackstone variants - Enhanced Nether Brick textures - Redesigned Quartz Bricks - Reworked Crying Obsidian - Classic-style Netherite Block ## Screenshots You can view the full screenshot gallery in the **Gallery** tab.

## Feedback If you have any suggestions to improve the pack, feel free to DM me on Reddit at u/MarkTriks. ## For Modpacks and similar use This pack is licensed under the **Creative Commons Attribution-NoDerivatives** license. You are free to include this pack in your modpack, provided that you: - Credit me as the creator of the pack. - Provide a direct link to this page. Additionally, since this pack is exclusively published on Modrinth, Modrinth is the only platform where you are permitted to publish any work that includes or builds upon this pack.
